training_status: 6 days in gym per week, no cheat meals, no junk food

benefits.description: Takes Reta primarily for the non-GLP-1 receptors (GIP and glucagon), not primarily for appetite suppression. Near perfect shape at 6'2", 200lb, 14% body fat.

side_effects.description: 2mg/week was too much appetite suppression; dropped to 1mg/week

protocol_notes: 6'2", 200lb, 14% BF. Recommends starting at 1mg/week and titrating slowly. Found 2mg too much appetite suppression. Experienced 48 hours of discomfort at higher dose.
